title: The UFO files
subtitle: Here is the web site, with some of the files released, I have not yet had a chance to look or to read any reliable summaries. More releases are expected, and as of this moment the Kalshi market is at 25 or so. The post The UFO files appeared first on Marginal REVOLUTION .
contentHtml:
Here is the web site, with some of the files released, I have not yet had a chance to look or to read any reliable summaries.  More releases are expected, and as of this moment the Kalshi market is at 25 or so.

The post The UFO files appeared first on Marginal REVOLUTION.
